name: Fractal Design Epoch ATX Mid-Tower Computer Case - Black Solid - Mesh Top & Front Panels - 3x 120mm Momentum 12 Front Fans - 1x USB Type-C 20Gbps - 2x USB Type-A 5Gbps - HD Audio Port (FD-C-EPO1A-01)
